response: {"subfigures":[{"label":"a","description":"A schematic diagram illustrating the eCLIP-seq workflow: RBP-RNA interactions are stabilized by UV crosslinking, followed by limited RNase I digestion, immunoprecipitation with a specific antibody, stringent washes, RNA dephosphorylation, inline barcoded RNA adapter ligation, protein gel electrophoresis, nitrocellulose membrane transfer, size excision, proteinase K treatment, and paired-end sequencing library preparation. Read 1 begins with the inline barcode and read 2 begins with a random-mer followed by sequence corresponding to the 5′ end of the original RNA fragment, often marking reverse transcriptase termination at the crosslink site.","plot_type":"image","plot_category":"image","x_axis":null,"y_axis":null,"color_variable":null,"error_bars":"none","sample_size":null,"shows_individual_points":false,"data_source":null,"assays":["eCLIP-seq"],"supplementary_tables":[],"statistical_test":null,"facet_variable":null}]}
